svg.title: Messy Mashup end-to-end pipeline architecture
svg.desc: Pipeline from audio stems through cross-song mixing, feature extraction, three parallel models CNN CRNN and HuBERT, systematic TTA, and weighted ensemble to genre prediction

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me about the training dataset structure')
sendPrompt('Explain the cross-song stem mixing strategy')
sendPrompt('What is a Mel spectrogram and why use it for music?')
sendPrompt('Why does HuBERT use raw waveforms instead of spectrograms?')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the GenreCNN architecture')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the GenreCRNN BiLSTM architecture')
sendPrompt('Tell me about HuBERT and phased training')
sendPrompt('Explain the systematic test-time augmentation with 5 windows')
sendPrompt('How does the weighted soft voting ensemble work?')
sendPrompt('What are the 10 music genres in the Messy Mashup competition?')
